visualization.name: RMSX Molstar FlipBook
visualization.description: Render RMSX Molstar FlipBook viewer manifests.
visualization.help: This visualization opens RMSX `rmsx-molstar-viewer/v1` manifests produced by the RMSX trajectory analysis tool and renders the embedded PDB slices with Molstar. The conservative wrapper emits standard JSON, and schema validation runs before rendering. The project-local `rmsxmolstar` datatype remains accepted for prototype Galaxy instances that register it explicitly.
